title: Mod Manager
description: An extension for Mod Menu which allows you to manage your mods ingame
body:
# Please use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)'s mod updater rather than this. Mod Manager will begin to break in February 2023. —Modrinth Staff ### This mod needs [fabric-language-kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) to work
ModManager is an extension for [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) It allows you to: * Browse Modrinth in Minecraft * Install, remove and update mods through a button press * Shows a toast (little notification in the right corner) when mod updates are available * Shows only mods compatible with the used Minecraft version #### Screenshots: Preview of a category ![Category](https://i.imgur.com/zZx43j4.png) Preview of a mod ![Mod](https://i.imgur.com/S5D4cVj.png) An search example ![Search](https://i.imgur.com/6u7SfpV.png)
